data.content: [Claude 2026-04-30] Could not run completion command 'kno next knots-9aa6 --expected-state implementation --lease knots-dc90 --actor-kind agent' because the foolery lease knots-dc90 was terminated externally at 13:03:17 (mid-session, likely TTL expiry), which rolled the knot state back from 'implementation' to 'ready_for_implementation'. Implementation work itself is complete and pushed: branch feature/knots-9aa6-fix-tag-filter-pagination, commit b455ced3. The next claim of this knot can re-enter implementation, observe the existing branch tag, and advance directly to implementation_review without redoing the work.
